basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for DEO, Project Research Scientist Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 2 Research Project Recruitment Notice Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the AIIMS Jodhpur office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.age_details: Max 40 years for Scientist II, Max 30 years for Data Entry Operator
age_limit.details: Project Research Scientist - II (Non-Medical): Maximum age limit is 40 years. Data Entry Operator: Maximum age limit is 30 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in science with experience or PhD for Scientist; Graduate/Post Graduate degree in Computer Sciences for Data Entry Operator.
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist - II (Non-Medical): First Class Post Graduate Degree in science, including the integrated PG degrees, with three Years' Experience or PhD in sciences. Desirable: Previous experience of at least 2 years in clinical trials or other biomedical research, Knowledge of computer applications, Proficiency in MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint and Statistical software. Data Entry Operator: Graduate/Post Graduate degree in Computer Sciences with good knowledge on computer. Desirable: Experience in data entry work, preferably in health or research projects. Knowledge of computer applications. Proficiency in MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint and Statistical software.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 67,000/- +HRA 20% for Scientist II; Rs. 29,200/- (Consolidated) for Data Entry Operator.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Jodhpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified dates: 26 May 2026 for Data Entry Operator and 28 May 2026 for Project Research Scientist - II.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Research Project Recruitment Notice at AIIMS Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: For Project Research Scientist - II, a Post Graduate Degree in science with experience or PhD is required. For Data Entry Operator, a Graduate/Post Graduate degree in Computer Sciences is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Data Entry Operator post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist - II post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Research Scientist - II post is Rs. 67,000/- plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to appear in person with all required documents on the interview dates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on a Walk-In-Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be conducted at All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur, Rajasthan, 342005.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all relevant original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies of documents regarding age, qualifications, and relevant experience.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
